title: Dekton High Power Type C-Rechargeable Flashlight Super powered XPE LED,200 Lumens| Adjustable Zoom Focus| High-Strobe-Side COB ON| Anodized Oxidation| Includes: USB Cable & Lithium battery
features: Super-Powered XPE LED & 200 Lumens Brightness: The Dekton High Power Flashlight is equipped with a super-powered XPE LED that delivers a powerful 200 lumens of brightness, ensuring you have a reliable light source in any situation. Whether you're navigating dark trails, working in low-light conditions, or dealing with an emergency.

Adjustable Zoom Focus for Versatile Lighting: Tailor your lighting to your specific needs with the adjustable zoom focus feature. The Dekton flashlight allows you to easily switch between a broad, sweeping beam for wide-area illumination and a focused spotlight for pinpoint accuracy.

Multiple Lighting Modes – High, Strobe, & Side COB ON: This flashlight offers three essential lighting modes: High, Strobe, and Side COB ON. The High mode provides maximum brightness for situations where you need full illumination. The Strobe mode is perfect for emergency signaling, attracting attention, or disorienting potential threats.

Rechargeable & Type-C USB Compatibility: Say goodbye to disposable batteries with the Dekton High Power Flashlight. It features a rechargeable design with a Type-C USB compatibility, allowing for quick and convenient charging. The included USB cable and lithium battery ensure that you have everything you need to keep your flashlight powered up and ready to go.

Durable Anodized Oxidation Finish: Built to withstand the elements, the Dekton flashlight boasts an anodized oxidation finish that provides superior durability and corrosion resistance. This rugged design ensures that your flashlight can handle rough conditions, whether you're hiking, camping, or dealing with emergencies.
description: The Dekton High Power Type C-Rechargeable Flashlight is a powerful and versatile lighting tool designed to meet the needs of both professionals and outdoor enthusiasts. Equipped with a super-powered XPE LED, this flashlight delivers an impressive 200 lumens of bright, focused light, providing excellent visibility in low-light conditions. The adjustable zoom focus allows you to easily switch between a wide floodlight for broad coverage and a focused spotlight for precision tasks, making it adaptable to various scenarios. This flashlight features multiple lighting modes, including high, strobe, and side COB ON, offering versatility for different situations. Whether you need intense illumination, an emergency strobe, or a soft area light, the Dekton flashlight has you covered. The side COB light is particularly useful for tasks requiring broad, even lighting, such as reading or working in close quarters. One of the standout features of this flashlight is its rechargeable design. It comes with a Type-C USB cable and a high-capacity lithium battery, ensuring you have a reliable power source that’s easy to recharge. The anodized oxidation finish not only adds to its durability, protecting it against wear and corrosion, but also gives it a sleek, professional appearance.Compact and lightweight, the Dekton High Power Type C-Rechargeable Flashlight is easy to carry, making it a practical addition to your everyday carry kit or emergency preparedness bag.
